content: Naive fixed-size chunking splits semantic units (tables, headers, code blocks, lists) across boundaries, creating useless partial fragments in the vector store. Tiny chunks (<100 tokens) are too narrow; top-K retrieval finds them but they lack enough context for generation. Stale embeddings from outdated docs return wrong context. Gemini text-embedding-004 free tier: 100 RPM, 1,000 RPD. A 100-page document at ~2 chunks/page = 200 API calls, consuming 20% of the daily quota in one upload. Mitigation: batch embedding requests, add per-session upload size limits, use paragraph/semantic-aware splitters, add 10-20% overlap.
